title: wedelia comaxillaris
intro: Wedelia comaxillaris, also known as Wedelia or Mexican daisy, is a flowering plant native to the Americas, belonging to the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. Its leaves and flowers possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and aiding in digestion. Wedelia comaxillaris can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
